customer.subject: Booking request received
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

We received your booking request at {{tenantName}}.

Services: {{serviceNames}}

Date/Time: {{scheduledAt}}

Total: {{totalPrice}}

We will contact you to confirm your booking.

customer.subject: Your booking is confirmed!
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

Your booking has been confirmed.

Date: {{localDate}}

Time: {{localTime}}

Services: {{serviceNames}}

Total: {{totalPrice}}

We look forward to seeing you!

customer.subject: Your booking was not accepted
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

Unfortunately we could not confirm your booking.

Reason: {{reason}}

Feel free to make a new booking on our website.

customer.subject: We need more information about your booking
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

Our team needs more information before confirming your booking.

Information needed: {{informationNeeded}}

Click here to respond

admin.subject: Customer responded to the information request
admin.body:
Customer {{submittedByEmail}} responded to the information request.

Response: {{customerResponse}}

View booking in the dashboard

customer.subject: Your booking has been cancelled
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

Your booking has been cancelled.

Date: {{localDate}}

Time: {{localTime}}

Services: {{serviceNames}}

Total: {{totalPrice}}

Feel free to make a new booking on our website.

customer.subject: Your booking has been rescheduled
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

Your booking has been rescheduled.

Previous date: {{previousLocalDate}} at {{previousLocalTime}}

New date: {{newLocalDate}} at {{newLocalTime}}

Services: {{serviceNames}}

Total: {{totalPrice}}

We look forward to seeing you!

customer.subject: Reminder: your booking is tomorrow!
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

Just a reminder that your booking is tomorrow.

Date: {{localDate}}

Time: {{localTime}}

Services: {{serviceNames}}

See you tomorrow!

customer.subject: Reminder: your booking is today!
customer.body:
Hello, {{contactName}}!

Just a reminder that your booking is today.

Time: {{localTime}}

Services: {{serviceNames}}

We are looking forward to seeing you!

customer.subject: You earned loyalty points!
customer.body:
Hello, {{customerName}}!

Your service is complete and you earned {{totalPointsEarned}} points in loyalty rewards.

Your current balance is {{currentBalance}} points.

Use your points on your next booking!

customer.subject: Your points are about to expire
customer.body:
Hello, {{customerName}}!

You have {{pointsExpiringSoon}} points about to expire on {{earliestExpiresAt}}.

Make a booking to use your points before they expire.

staff.subject: Invitation to join Ikaro
staff.body:
Hello, {{staffName}}!

You have been invited to join the {{tenantName}} team on the Ikaro platform.

Click here to accept the invitation and access your account.

If you were not expecting this invitation, please ignore this email.
